exclude.@eslint/js: Version 10.x requires ESLint 10, blocked by @babel/eslint-parser peer dependency (eslint ^9)
exclude.eslint: Upgrade to 10.x blocked by @babel/eslint-parser peer dependency (eslint ^9)
exclude.chai: Major version 6.x is ESM-only, requires test infrastructure migration
exclude.express: Major version 5.x upgrade deferred - significant API breaking changes
